PRIYA NAIR
Lead Quality Assurance Engineer
Kochi, India | +91 99467 22810 | priya.nair1995@gmail.com
SUMMARY
Result oriented testing professional with over eleven years of rich hands-on
experience in manual and automation testing of web and mobile applications,
seeking a senior QA leadership role in a growth oriented organisation.
EXPERIENCE
Lead QA Engineer – UST Global, Thiruvananthapuram 07.2020 – Present
• Leading a team of 9 QA engineers across three scrum squads testing a US
healthcare claims adjudication platform
• Built a Selenium WebDriver and TestNG regression suite of 1,400 cases
cutting release certification effort from ten days to three
◦ INTRODUCED SHIFT-LEFT TESTING AND REDUCED PRODUCTION DEFECTS BY 38 PERCENT
• Drove the Jira to Azure DevOps migration between 02.2021 – 09.2021 for all
QA assets including test plans and pipelines
Senior Test Engineer – QBurst Technologies, Kochi 05.2016 – 06.2020
• Automated REST API checks with Postman and Newman saving 30 hours per
release cycle for an ecommerce client
• Performed load tests in JMeter simulating 50,000 concurrent users before
the annual festival sale event
– MENTORED FOUR FRESHERS WHO ALL CLEARED ISTQB IN FIRST ATTEMPT
Test Engineer – Infosys, Mysuru 10.2013 – 04.2016
• Executed regression packs for a European telecom billing system
• Logged and triaged defects in HP Quality Center with detailed steps
QA Analyst – Allianz Cornhill Information Services, Trivandrum 01.2012 – 09.2013
· Tested motor insurance quote journeys against UK underwriting rules
Junior Tester – Toonz Animation India, Trivandrum 06.2010 – 12.2011
▪ Verified render farm output frames and raised colour mismatch defects

Testing Tools: Selenium WebDriver, TestNG, Postman, JMeter, Appium, Cypress
Languages: Java, Python, SQL
Process: Agile Scrum, JIRA, Azure DevOps, Confluence, HP Quality Center

Master of Computer Applications, Cochin University of Science and Technology 2007 – 2010 CGPA: 7.8/10

EXPERIENCE
Computer Faculty – NIIT Centre, Ernakulam 03.2009 – 05.2010
• Conducted C programming and MS Office batches for 120 working students
Data Analyst Trainee – Muthoot Fincorp, Kochi 08.2008 – 02.2009
• Prepared daily gold loan disbursement reports in Excel for branch heads
